tasks.description: Add the 8 new prep commands (16 files, 8 pairs in .claude/commands/ and src/.claude/commands/)

Merge temp improvements into existing commands + update first-line descriptions (kickoff, commit-only, commit-and-push, run-build, run-pe, run-pm, run-qa, run-sde) and update showme.md and kickoff-complex.md first lines. Also rename showme.md to show-me.md in both .claude/commands/ and src/.claude/commands/ to match hyphenated naming convention.
Update CLAUDE.md command tables in both root and src/ (add 8 new prep command rows, rename /showme to /show-me in existing rows)
Delete temp/ folder and final verification (byte-identical check, stale reference grep, untouched file confirmation, confirm showme.md no longer exists and show-me.md is present)
